title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
